title: Simple Spears
description: a very vanilla friendly spears mod
body:
[YOUTUBE VIDEO SHOWCASE] (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k3IUNDumiFc&t=9s)

**_PLEASE_ COMMENT FEEDBACK!!!!!! It helps me so much as a developer, please tell me what you like/dislike about the mod!**


Simple Spears adds the spear - a mechanically similar item to the trident. Spears do less melee damage than tridents, but do double the thrown damage of its melee value (e.g. diamond spear does 6 melee damage, does 12 thrown damage).

Spears have each of the 6 vanilla material variants, and I plan to add mod compat if people show interest in the mod.

SS also introduces a new enchantment, Spiraling. It essentially functions as power, for the damage of the spear (or trident). For every level of spiraling (going up to 5), it adds another heart (or 2 damage) to the thrown damage value of your spear/trident (not the melee damage).

![spear items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7710e4b23088707f84133af6ff6d631f29d6497.png)

![spear models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d366a622a8104959825b70676f8983962a5f7887.png)

![recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd95f05058744c32eb242b3259160185611e2fb.png)

Pros and Cons

+ can be enchanted with Sharpness (as well as BoA and Smite), Fire Aspect, and Looting. Spears also retain the ability to have Loyalty.

+ deal double the thrown damage of their melee values

+ can be crafted

- cannot be enchanted with channeling, impaling, or riptide

- have lower melee damage and attack speed than tridents
